audit.summary: Extraction faithfully reproduces all sections of the live page in correct order. Hero, press quotes, testimonials, intro, stats, feature splits, DAKI sub-sections, comparison table, CTA, and integrations are all present with accurate content. The "Uniformisez le reporting projet" feature-split correctly omits an image since the live page uses a Lottie animation (not an image) in that slot. The "Presentation reviews" section uses a real product mockup image. Testimonial role for Marie-Odile Lhomme was shortened from a long duplicated string on live to a clean "Chief Digital & Information Officer" — minor faithful normalization.

sections.title: Testimonials
sections.note: Marie-Odile Lhomme role was shortened from a duplicated long live string to a clean canonical title.
